playbook.intent: 60-90 min poker session for the next sprint → offshore team scale calibrated with client scale, preventing 'why did your 3 take a week' debates.
playbook.scope: Atomic estimation ceremony with a joint offshore + client team. Output: each backlog item sized; offshore and client scales calibrated; explicit spike decisions for unknowns; estimation notes archived. Run weekly or bi-weekly per sprint cadence.

success-criteria.criterion: Spike decisions captured for risky items
No 'why did your 3 take a week' fight after the sprint

stage.name: Calibrate
stage.intent: Lock the scale before estimating anything new.

tasks.task: Pick 2 reference stories from previous sprint (one small, one medium)
Recall how long they actually took
Agree the scale anchor between offshore + client team
Active-listening pass for any silent disagreement

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when both teams agree the anchors. If not, recalibrate.

stage.name: Estimate
stage.intent: Run the poker; surface dissent fast.

tasks.task: Run poker per ticket; reveal estimates simultaneously
Discuss outliers; do not average silently
Apply cost-estimation patterns where points need defending

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when outliers are resolved by discussion, not majority vote.

stage.name: Spike or commit
stage.intent: Decide which unknowns become spikes vs estimates.

tasks.task: Decide spike vs estimate per the spike-vs-estimate rule
Tag spike tickets with a time-box

stage.decision-gate: Ceremony closes only when each backlog item is either sized or spiked.

extra.value: [Sprint planning — separate ceremony, Capacity planning — separate review, Cost estimation — story points are not money]
[Backlog at Definition of Ready, 'Joint team agreed on scale (Fibonacci, T-shirt, etc.)', Reference stories from a previous sprint]
[Averaging votes silently — kills the calibration signal, Estimating without an anchor — drift between teams compounds, Skipping spikes on big unknowns — sprint then misses]
['Did we calibrate on actual past stories, not theory?', 'Did we resolve outliers by discussion?', 'Did every risky item get a spike or an honest estimate?']

{human: faion get-content story-points-estimation-poker --format md, agent: faion get-content story-points-estimation-poker --format context, json: faion get-content story-points-estimation-poker --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, atomic angle'}]
